wine_bars_late.name: Le Chapon Fin Bar a Vins (late)
wine_bars_late.wine_program: 600-label Bordeaux-centric cellar open late; classified growth by-the-glass available until midnight; full kitchen service until 23:00
wine_bars_late.description: Bordeaux's grandest historic restaurant keeps its bar and wine service open late into the evening with the full 600-label list accessible. Popular with chateau owners after tasting dinners.

wine_bars_late.name: Bodega Bar a Vins (Chartrons, late)
wine_bars_late.wine_program: 250-label Bordeaux list; late-night by-the-glass service with charcuterie boards; second wines of classified growths always available
wine_bars_late.description: The quayside Chartrons wine bar stays open late with a full by-the-glass service of Bordeaux appellations and serves light charcuterie and cheese plates until closing.

wine_bars_late.name: Latitude 20 Bar a Vins (late)
wine_bars_late.wine_program: 200-reference Bordeaux list; late-night service Thursday-Saturday with wine trade social crowd; sommelier on duty until midnight
wine_bars_late.description: Chartrons wine bar keeping late hours Thursday to Saturday, popular with Bordeaux's wine trade community; rotating by-the-glass list changes weekly.

wine_bars_late.name: L'Oiseau Vins (Capucins, late)
wine_bars_late.wine_program: 80-bottle rotating natural and classic Bordeaux list; late-night small plates; sommelier-owners present most evenings
wine_bars_late.description: Late-evening neighbourhood wine bar near the Capucins market, run by a sommelier couple, serving satellite appellation Bordeaux and natural wines until midnight-plus.

listening_bars.name: Le Depot Legal
listening_bars.address: 4 rue du Palais Gallien, 33000 Bordeaux, France
listening_bars.wine_program: Bordeaux and French natural wine list; 60+ references; vinyl soundtrack; Bandcamp-sourced small-run natural producers from Fronsac and Languedoc
listening_bars.description: Bordeaux's premier vinyl-and-natural-wine bar: a record shop by day, listening bar at night. Small but focused Bordeaux natural list alongside French and European selections; DJ sets Friday-Saturday.

listening_bars.name: Le Bar a Gin et a Vin
listening_bars.wine_program: Curated 50-bottle Bordeaux and South-West France wine list with vinyl DJ set Thursday-Saturday; natural wine emphasis; paired gin cocktails using Gascon botanicals
listening_bars.description: Old-town bar combining natural wine service with a curated vinyl DJ programme and gin cocktails. Intimate basement space; Bordeaux natural producers featured prominently.

candle_lit.name: La Maison de Bordeaux (Candlelit Cave)
candle_lit.wine_program: 100-label Bordeaux list served in a stone-vaulted 17th-century cellar; candlelit atmosphere; reserve Medoc and Right Bank selections by the glass
candle_lit.description: Stone-vaulted medieval cellar on Place du Parlement serving Bordeaux wines by candlelight until late. Popular for private dinners and first-date Bordeaux experiences; cheese and charcuterie boards.

candle_lit.name: La Petite Gironde (riverside candlelit wine bar)
candle_lit.neighborhood: La Bastide (right bank of Garonne), Bordeaux
candle_lit.wine_program: Exclusively Gironde wine list; 80 references; riverside terrace with views back to Bordeaux city; candlelit cave seating below deck level
candle_lit.description: Romantic riverside wine bar on the La Bastide right bank opposite the Bordeaux waterfront, with candlelit cave seating and a Gironde-only wine list. Perfect for evening drinks watching the sunset over the historic quays.

candle_lit.name: Cordeillan-Bages Barrel Cellar Dinner (candlelit)
candle_lit.wine_program: Private 5-course candlelit dinner in Lynch-Bages underground barrel cellar; 1,200-label Medoc vertical list; Michelin-starred kitchen
candle_lit.description: The most dramatic candlelit wine experience in the Medoc: private dining in the underground barrel chai of Lynch-Bages, Michelin-starred kitchen, and the Cazes family's unparalleled cellar.

lounges.name: Le Pressoir d'Argent Lounge Bar
lounges.address: InterContinental Bordeaux - Le Grand Hotel, 2-5 place de la Comedie, 33000 Bordeaux, France
lounges.wine_program: Hotel bar adjacent to Gordon Ramsay's restaurant; full Bordeaux first-growth by-the-glass list; Grand Hotel cellar access; champagne and Sauternes cocktail programme
lounges.description: The Grand Hotel's lounge bar at the base of Le Pressoir d'Argent restaurant; glamorous Art Deco interior; Bordeaux first-growth and premium champagne by the glass nightly.

lounges.name: The Keys Lounge at Chateau Troplong Mondot
lounges.wine_program: Hotel lounge with estate Troplong Mondot by the glass across multiple vintages; Right Bank Premier Grand Cru Classe selection; Sauternes and champagne available
lounges.description: Hilltop hotel lounge with panoramic Dordogne valley views at night; Troplong Mondot estate pours and a Right Bank-focused wine list available to hotel guests and walk-in visitors.

fortified_specialists.name: Bar L'Epoque (Sauternes specialist)
fortified_specialists.address: 3 place de la Mairie, 33210 Barsac, France
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Village bar in Barsac with the area's best Sauternes and Barsac by-the-glass list; d'Yquem, Rieussec, Climens, and Doisy-Daene all available; foie gras pairings
fortified_specialists.description: Barsac's local wine bar offering the most comprehensive village-level Sauternes-Barsac by-the-glass selection, including Premier Cru estates rarely poured by the glass elsewhere.

fortified_specialists.name: Wine Not Bar - Fortified and Dessert Wine Evenings
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Monthly themed evenings dedicated to fortified and dessert wines: Sauternes, Banyuls, Maury, and late-harvest Sauvignon selections from the Bordeaux region and South-West France
fortified_specialists.description: Saint-Michel wine bar hosting monthly fortified and dessert wine evenings with a Sauternes and South-West France focus, popular with wine enthusiasts seeking Banyuls, Maury, and late-harvest pours not available elsewhere.

late_tastings.name: Bordeaux Wine School Evening Tastings
late_tastings.wine_program: CIVB evening tasting courses: 3-hour structured tastings of Bordeaux appellations on Friday and Saturday evenings; 15+ wines with guided notes
late_tastings.description: The Bordeaux Wine School runs structured evening tasting programmes on Fridays and Saturdays covering individual appellations (Pauillac, Saint-Emilion, Sauternes) with guided notes; bilingual English-French.

late_tastings.name: L'Intendant Late Tasting Counter
late_tastings.wine_program: Tasting counter open until 21:00 with rotating nightly flights of Bordeaux appellations; vertical Medoc and Right Bank flights priced from EUR 20; 15,000 reference library browsable
late_tastings.description: L'Intendant's spiral-staircase wine tower opens its ground-floor tasting counter for late-afternoon and evening flights; the full 15,000-label reference collection is browsable while tasting.

late_tastings.name: Maison du Vin de Pauillac Evening Tasting
late_tastings.address: La Verrerie, quai de Pouvourville, 33250 Pauillac, France
late_tastings.wine_program: Seasonal evening tasting events on Pauillac quayside: classified growth flights at sunset over the Gironde estuary; advance booking required
late_tastings.description: The Pauillac Maison du Vin hosts seasonal evening tasting events overlooking the Gironde estuary; pre-booked groups and walk-in visitors welcome during summer months for sunset classified growth flights.

verified.address_quoted: La Verrerie, quai de Pouvourville, 33250 Pauillac

sparkling_rooms.name: Le Pressoir d'Argent Champagne Selection
sparkling_rooms.address: InterContinental Bordeaux - Le Grand Hotel, 2-5 place de la Comedie, 33000 Bordeaux, France
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: 50-label champagne and cremant list at the Grand Hotel bar; Krug, Dom Perignon, Salon, and Bollinger Grande Annee by the glass; Cremant de Bordeaux from local producers also featured
sparkling_rooms.description: The Grand Hotel bar's champagne and sparkling wine programme is Bordeaux's most comprehensive, covering prestige champagne houses and local Cremant de Bordeaux producers in a formal Art Deco setting.

sparkling_rooms.name: Cave du Cremant de Bordeaux (Badie selection)
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Badie's dedicated Cremant de Bordeaux selection counter: all major cooperative and independent producers of Bordeaux sparkling wine (methode traditionnelle); by the glass during opening hours
sparkling_rooms.description: Badie caviste stocks the broadest Cremant de Bordeaux selection in the city, with a tasting counter offering current releases by the glass. Cremant de Bordeaux is rarely found outside France and represents excellent local sparkling wine value.
